benefits.description: GHRP peptides help cut through appetite suppression from Retatrutide

protocol_notes: Reports on friend's extensive A/B testing (year-long) comparing fasted vs non-fasted dosing of Tesamorelin/Ipamorelin with repeated IGF-1 testing. Friend found better IGF-1 response when taken with a meal vs fasted, contrary to community consensus. Notes GHRP peptides increase appetite via mouse trials. Ipamorelin is microdose for appetite effect.
